purpose: Track psychological progression, buying committee exposure, and intent acceleration instead of vanity metrics.
core_principle: In High-Ticket strategy, we measure movement in certainty — not just clicks.

layer_1_intent_progression_tracking.rule: If content consumption complexity increases, intent is maturing.

layer_2_committee_penetration_tracking.goal: Measure exposure across buying committee roles.
signals: Different job titles engaging with content
layer_2_committee_penetration_tracking.rule: No deal probability increase without multi-role engagement.

layer_3_touchpoint_effectiveness.goal: Evaluate which touchpoints move accounts forward.
layer_3_touchpoint_effectiveness.rule: A touchpoint is effective only if it increases next-stage progression.

signals: Case study to meeting conversion rate
layer_4_bridge_performance.warning_flag: High drop between stages indicates missing or weak bridge.

layer_5_risk_reduction_tracking.interpretation: If financial and compliance assets are consumed, trust is building.

account_level_kpis.account_awareness_score: Composite of brand search, direct visits, and multi-asset exposure.
account_level_kpis.intent_velocity_score: Time taken to move between stages.

egypt.weighting: Human interaction and direct communication signals carry higher weight.

saudi_arabia.weighting: Committee diversity and compliance engagement carry higher weight.

uae.weighting: Speed of stage transition and structured asset consumption carry higher weight.

vanity_metrics_to_ignore: Lead form submissions without committee mapping
early_warning_signals: High education consumption but zero validation engagement
final_rule: Measurement must track psychological certainty accumulation, not traffic volume.
